business_ideas.idea: Music streaming optimization - independent artists monetizing via Spotify, YouTube, TikTok
YouTube Shorts strategy - pinned links to streams, better creator monetization than TikTok
Artist brand deals - six-figure sponsorships for music placement in commercials/games
Music publishing rights strategy - separate revenue stream from master recordings
Artist merchandise and live touring - multi-stream revenue model

predictions.text: YouTube Shorts will outpace TikTok for creator monetization and control
Direct-to-fan revenue (merch, publishing) will exceed streaming income for successful independents
